Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}The hot spring's over there, right? Now if you consider how the garden is fenced...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Are you seriously trying to peep? You do know you can get arrested for that, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Of course not, I'm not stupid. But just imagine the steamy paradise beyond the garden fence![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Close your eyes and focus... Then you'll see everything inside your mind![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Give it up, you idiot. No way you can see a damn thing like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Give up!? Never! Nothing is impossible![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}And you call yourself an athlete!? Where's your spirit!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}You're the only one holding yourself back! You gotta push your limits to succeed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}...I never thought I'd see the day you'd teach me something about sportsmanship![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}You're right. I'm not gonna give up... I'll never give up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}Sooo... How's it going over there, Miyamoto?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}I can't see a thing, man. It's just pitch black. Wonder if it's all the steam...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}The hot spring's in there, right? So based on the hotel's layout...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}This guy seriously thinks he can sneak a peek.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}Give it up, Kenji. What, do you think you're ten feet tall?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Give up!? Never! Nothing is impossible![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}What kinda athlete are you!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you accept your limits, you'll never succeed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}...I never thought of it that way...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Although I guess our height is one of those limitations we can't overcome...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Oh, hey, {f 4 1}. You already changed into your yukata? Damn, you're fast.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Dude, you won't believe what Miyamoto did today. Help me talk some sense into him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}And do you always have to wear that stupid jersey?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}'Course I do! This way, I'm ready to run wherever, whenever. Duh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}That's the problem! You literally just run off! You have no idea how exhausted I am because of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Do you know what this guy did? He went on a mad dash up the hill at Kiyomizu-dera...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}The rest of our group had to chug along to try and keep up with him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Look, man, if you see an incline, you gotta run uphill. That's what a real athlete does. Right, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Whew, I worked up a sweat after that run. Guess I'll hit the baths.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}At this rate, I'm gonna run outta stamina before the trip's over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Dude, what about the girls in our group? You better apologize to them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}...It's already the last night of our trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}All we ever did was visit the temples, but I think I'm gonna miss it here once we get home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}There's just one thing I regret...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Where is the girl of my dreams!? Aren't romantic encounters supposed to happen on school trips?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}That's all you ever talk about. Isn't it about time you grow up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Wow, look at you all high and mighty. Even though you're the one sneaking glances at Takeba-san in her yukata.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Haha, there's nothing to be embarrassed about. She's a real sight for sore eyes, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Sh-Shut up! I said I wasn't looking at her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is our last night... *sigh* All we did was visit shrines, but I'm kinda sad about going home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's still one thing we've gotta do, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Come on, Kaz! Right here, right now! This is our last chance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}You crouch down, and I'll get on your back! That way, I can see![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}H-Hey... Why are you pulling me into this!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Dude, we can take turns! Come on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}No! I'm not listening to you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why not!? It's not dirty! What's your plan, just walk in there and stare? That's just as bad![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* Man... You're so boring... Why did I have to be in your group...?[n]{f 1 1}
